stemHtml: In relation to subsonic incompressible airflow through a Venturi, which of the following statements is correct? The static pressure...

options.a: in the throat is lower than in the undisturbed airflow.
options.b: after the passing through the throat falls.
options.c: in the throat is equal to that of the undisturbed airflow.
options.d: in the throat is higher than in the undisturbed airflow.
